title: Small-Town
description: Explore a world build on Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Terralith combined with Tectonic. Build huge industrial complexes with Create and all of its addons while building your perfect home with lots of additional blocks and decorations.
body:
# Overview

**Explore** a vast and immersive Minecraft world built on the incredible terrain generation of **Oh The Biomes We've Gone**, **Terralith**, and **Tectonic**. Unleash your creativity and engineering skills by constructing massive industrial complexes with the **Create** mod and its numerous addons. Alongside, design your dream home with an array of additional blocks and decorations.

### Key Features

- **World Generation**: Experience a diverse and rich landscape, thanks to the combination of **Oh The Biomes We've Gone**, **Terralith**, and **Tectonic**.
- **Industrial Power**: Harness the full potential of **Create** and its addons to build intricate factories, transportation systems, and more.
- **Home Building**: Customize your base with a plethora of blocks and decorations to make it uniquely yours.

Explore, build, and automate in a world that offers endless possibilities!
